methods.description: This method involves using the isotope-enabled isoCAM3 model to simulate stable water isotopes in the NCAR CAM3 (T31) for the last 22,000 years. The purpose is to study the water isotope response over time.

steps.description: Perform time-slice experiments for the last 22,000 years with each consecutive snapshot 1,000 years apart.
steps.searchable_summary: run time-slice experiments using isoCAM3 for 22,000 years
outputs: model outputs for each time slice

steps.description: Force experiments with realistic greenhouse gas concentrations, orbital parameters, land ice sheet, land-ocean mask, and monthly sea surface temperature and sea ice fraction from CCSM3.
steps.searchable_summary: apply forcing parameters to isoCAM3 experiments
inputs: SST and sea ice data from CCSM3

steps.description: Linearly interpolate δ18O values at the sea surface from 1.6 ‰ for 22 ka to 0.5 ‰ for 0 ka.
Integrate each slice for 50 years and use the last 30-year model outputs for analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: integrate model slices and extract last 30 years for analysis

methods.description: This method involves performing AMIP-type experiments using isoCAM3 with observed SST and sea ice data to investigate isotope variability on an interannual timescale.

steps.description: Perform a set of four-member AMIP-type experiments using isoCAM3 with forcing of observed SST and sea ice from HadISST1.1, covering the period 1975-2004.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct AMIP-type experiments with isoCAM3 using HadISST1.1 data
inputs: HadISST1.1 SST and sea ice data

steps.description: Use the ensemble mean of these experiments to investigate the variability of isotopes on an interannual timescale.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze ensemble mean for isotope variability

methods.description: This method involves using GNIP data to compare model outputs with observed δ18O in precipitation over China.

steps.description: Collect monthly mean δ18O in precipitation from 31 stations over China covering the period 1961-2005.
steps.searchable_summary: collect GNIP δ18O precipitation data from China

steps.description: Average all available records of each month for each station to derive the mean seasonal cycle of δ18O in precipitation.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate mean seasonal cycle of δ18O
